settings.show_online_users_help: Enables the Online block in the widget
settings.show_online_guests_help: Approximate count of unauthenticated visitors based on IP+User-Agent fingerprint
settings.show_hidden_users_help: Number of hidden users without revealing their identity
settings.include_guests_in_total: Include guests in the online count
settings.exclude_bots_help: Prevents search engine crawlers from inflating the guest counter
settings.last_seen_interval_help: Minutes of inactivity before a user is considered offline
settings.stats_cache_duration_help: 0 disables caching. Not recommended for large forums
settings.ignore_private_discussions: Exclude private discussions from the count
settings.show_current_page: Show currently viewed page on avatar hover
settings.show_current_page_help: Tracks main forum sections — discussions and profiles. Shows a generic label otherwise
settings.enable_heartbeat_help: An open tab periodically sends a request that updates the user's active status
settings.heartbeat_interval_help: How often an active tab sends a presence ping. Lower values are more accurate but generate more background requests
settings.max_avatars_help: How many avatars to show in the widget. The rest collapse into a "+N" counter

permissions.view_online_users: View online users in the widget
permissions.view_discussions_count: View discussions count in the widget
permissions.view_posts_count: View posts count in the widget
permissions.view_users_count: View total users count in the widget
permissions.view_latest_registration: View latest registration in the widget
permissions.view_current_page: View browsed pages in the widget
